note: FEATURE LANE: fully clear the atlas-freshness crash-loop - mask the service (the timer kept re-triggering it) + stop/disable the timer. Sentinel goes fully green. The bottleneck-sentinel now owns freshness-watchdog.

steps.cmd: systemctl stop atlas-freshness.timer atlas-freshness.service 2>/dev/null; systemctl disable atlas-freshness.timer 2>/dev/null; systemctl mask atlas-freshness.service; systemctl reset-failed atlas-freshness.service 2>/dev/null; echo masked
